briefdescription.para: XV_hcresampler_CfgInitialize - Initialize the XV_hcresampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes an XV_hcresampler instance using the provided configuration structure and effective base address. It sets up the instance's configuration, assigns the base address, and marks the instance as ready.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_hcresampler instance to be initialized.
ConfigPtr
Pointer to the configuration structure containing hardware-specific settings.
EffectiveAddr
Physical base address of the device.
XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful.
Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
ConfigPtr must not be NULL.
EffectiveAddr must not be NULL.

briefdescription.para: This Function Starts the HC Resampler hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function initiates the operation of the HC Resampler by writing to the control register. It first asserts that the provided instance pointer is valid and that the core is ready. Then, it reads the current value of the control register, preserves the auto-restart bit (bit 7), and sets the start bit (bit 0) to begin processing.

simplesect.para: The function assumes that the hardware core has been properly initialized and is ready to start.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the HC Resampler hardware core has completed its operation.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the HC Resampler hardware core to determine if the current operation is done. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the core is ready before accessing the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hcresampler instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the operation is done, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the HC Resampler hardware core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the HC Resampler hardware core to determine if it is idle. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the core is ready before accessing the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hcresampler instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is idle, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the HC Resampler hardware core is ready for the next input.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the control register of the HC Resampler hardware core to determine if it is ready for the next input. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the core is ready before accessing the hardware register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hcresampler instance.

simplesect.para: 1 if the core is ready, 0 otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Enables the auto-restart feature of the HC Resampler hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the auto-restart bit in the control register of the HC Resampler, allowing the hardware to automatically restart its operation after completing a task, without requiring software intervention.

InstancePtr
Pointer to the XV_hcresampler instance.
None Preconditions:
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
The instance must be ready (IsReady == XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY).

briefdescription.para: Disable the auto-restart feature of the HC Resampler hardware.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart capability of the HC Resampler by writing '0' to the AP_CTRL register. After calling this function, the hardware will not automatically restart processing after completing a task and will require manual intervention to start again.

simplesect.para:
None CODE
InstancePtr must not be NULL.
InstancePtr->IsReady must be equal to XIL_COMPONENT_IS_READY.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register width for the HC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified width value to the hardware register associated with the HC resampler. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: The width value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWREG_WIDTH hardware register for the specified XV_hcresampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the HWREG_WIDTH register from the hardware and returns its value. It asserts that the provided instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the register.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWREG_WIDTH register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register value for the 'height' parameter of the HC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified height value to the corresponding hardware register of the given XV_hcresampler instance. It first asserts that the instance pointer is not NULL and that the instance is ready before performing the register write.

parameterdescription.para: The height value to be written to the hardware register.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the value of the HWReg_height hardware register from the HC Resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the current value of the HWReg_height register from the hardware using the base address specified in the instance configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_hcresampler instance. It must be initialized and ready before calling this function.

simplesect.para: The value of the HWReg_height register as a 32-bit unsigned integer.
The function asserts that InstancePtr is not NULL and that the instance is ready before accessing the hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the input video format hardware register for the HC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified input video format data to the hardware register associated with the given HC resampler instance.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the input video format hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current input video format hardware register value.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the input video format register from the hardware and returns it to the caller.

simplesect.para: The value of the input video format hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the output video format hardware register for the HC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified output video format data to the hardware register associated with the given HC resampler instance.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the output video format hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current output video format hardware register value.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the output video format register from the hardware and returns it to the caller.

simplesect.para: The value of the output video format hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Sets the hardware register coefficients for the HC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the specified coefficient data to the hardware register associated with the given HC resampler instance. It is used to configure the resampling filter coefficients.

parameterdescription.para: Value to be written to the coefficient hardware register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current coefficient hardware register value for the HC resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the value of the coefficient register from the hardware and returns it to the caller. It is used to obtain the current filter coefficients configured in the HC resampler.

simplesect.para: The value of the coefficient hardware register.

briefdescription.para: Enables global interrupts for the HC Resampler hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the global interrupt enable bit in the control register of the HC Resampler hardware core, allowing it to generate interrupts.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Disables global interrupts for the HC Resampler hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the global interrupt enable bit in the control register of the HC Resampler hardware core, preventing it from generating interrupts.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Enables specific interrupts for the HC Resampler hardware core.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the specified interrupt mask in the interrupt enable register of the HC Resampler hardware core, allowing those interrupts to be generated.

parameterdescription.para: The mask of interrupts to enable.

simplesect.para: None

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupts for the HC Resampler core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the Mask parameter for the given HC Resampler instance. It reads the current interrupt enable register, clears the bits specified by Mask, and writes the updated value back to the register.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Clears the specified interrupt(s) for the HC Resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the given interrupt mask to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) to clear the corresponding interrupt(s) for the specified HC Resampler instance.

parameterdescription.para: Bitmask specifying which interrupt(s) to clear.

simplesect.para: None.

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the interrupt enable register value for the HC Resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) of the specified XV_hcresampler instance to determine which interrupts are currently enabled.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt enable register (IER).

briefdescription.para: Retrieves the current interrupt status for the HC Resampler instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) of the specified XV_hcresampler instance to determine which interrupts are currently active.

simplesect.para: The value of the interrupt status register (ISR).
